case_title: SUGAR PLUM PROPERTIES VS. LISA STEPHENS et al

HEARING ON APPLICANT/DEFENDANT LISA STEPHENS' WAIVER OF ADDITIONAL COURT FEES AND COSTS. NO APPEARANCE BY APPLICANT. THE COURT BEING UNABLE TO EXAMINE APPLICANT RULED ON THE APPLICATION SUBMITTED. THE COURT FINDS THAT THE APPLICANT'S INCOME IS ENOUGH TO PAY THE COMMON NECESSARIES OF LIFE AND ADDITIONAL COURT FEES AND COSTS. FEE WAIVER DENIED. LISA STEPHENS HAS TEN DAYS TO PAY THE FILING FEES OR THE FILINGS WILL BE STRICKEN. ORDER DENYING WAIVER OF JURY FEES AND EXPENSES AND COURT REPORTERS' FEES SENT TO ALL PARTIES. JUDGE: JAMES MCBRIDE; CLERK: R. VELUZ; REPORTER: JOE VICKSTEIN, CSR# 4780 (206)
REMOVED FROM DENIED FEE WAIVER PAID CALENDAR: THE ANSWER FILED BY DEFT, LISA STEPHENS WAS STRICKEN FOR NON PAYMENT OF FEES. THERE ARE NO OTHER FILINGS TO STRIKE.
